title: MDC - Multi CAN Database
description: Canonical JSON contract for the LHR CAN telemetry platform. A DBC superset describing the full hierarchy Vehicle (root) → Network/Bus → Message → Signal, plus first-class metadata MDC adds over DBC: typed attribute definitions, display/viz hints, fault/alarm definitions, and computed (virtual) signals. Consumed by the C++ engine (decode), the app (mdc-editor), and the tools (dbc2mdc, generate_can_headers, mdc2grafana, mdc-validate). One MDC document = one vehicle; the root is the vehicle with its networks[].

schemaVersion.description: MDC contract version this document targets, e.g. "3.0.0". Major version is breaking; minor/patch are additive. Tools must reject a document whose major version they do not understand.

id.description: Vehicle/document identity, unique within a fleet when comparing files.

metadata.description: Provenance and free-form descriptive fields. Never semantically load-bearing for decode.

attributeDefinitions.description: Typed declarations for entries that may appear in any `attributes` map. Mirrors DBC attribute definitions (BA_DEF_) but adds an explicit `scopes` list and richer types. Tools use these for validation, editor widgets, and round-tripping back to DBC.

valueTables.description: Project-wide shared enumerations (DBC VAL_TABLE_ equivalent). A signal references one by name via `valueTableRef`; resolution is network-local first, then this project-shared list.

attributes.description: Vehicle-level typed attribute values (DBC BA_ on the vehicle).
